findings.description: .agent-dev/README.md and docs/project-overview.md are no longer in the tracked diff, but apps/trader-chart/* remains changed while T005 scope does not include trader-chart files.
Schema no longer blocks over-limit symbols before execute(); safeParse succeeds for 11 symbols and execute returns ok:false code=MULTI_SYMBOL_LIMIT.
watchlist still returns FORBIDDEN_COMMAND because the generic TIER1_COMMANDS branch runs before the watchlist-specific USE_NAMED_TOOL branch.
V306 deterministic check passes, but T005.json S2/S8 still mentions the old scan --help <300ms acceptance and T005.md still marks V303/V304 as requiring manual verification while S8 is done.
There is still no valid symbols[<=10] execute-path test for getLongbridgeQuote; tests cover direct >10 execute rejection and single-symbol fallback only.

resolved_since_last_review: F002 fixed: over-limit symbols now reach execute() and return MULTI_SYMBOL_LIMIT
Generic docs scope leak fixed: .agent-dev/README.md and docs/project-overview.md removed from tracked diff
